description: Trust Decay, Taste Graph v1, P1 hardening. After this phase, hex learns developer preferences across projects and auto-adjusts trust when regressions occur.

phases.description: Fix bugs discovered dog-fooding P1 and wire missing briefing events from coordination layer.
phases.name: P1 hardening — fix trust CLI, wire coordination events

tasks.description: hex trust show <project> returns 'endpoint not available'. Debug the NexusClient path — likely the CLI is building the wrong query string or the route path doesn't match. Verify by calling curl http://127.0.0.1:5555/api/trust?project=hex-intf directly and comparing with what the CLI sends. Fix the CLI or route to make them match.
tasks.name: Fix hex trust show CLI → nexus route wiring

tasks.description: Add log_briefing_event() calls to hex-nexus/src/coordination/mod.rs at: (1) swarm task completion, (2) agent death/stale detection, (3) swarm completion. Use the same HexFlo memory pattern as workplan_executor.rs: key 'briefing:{timestamp}', value JSON with severity/category/title/body. Severity: task complete = nominal, agent death = critical, swarm complete = notable.
tasks.name: Wire briefing events from coordination layer

tasks.description: GET /api/briefing currently returns active tasks and inbox notifications but NOT the briefing events logged by P2.3. Update hex-nexus/src/routes/briefing.rs to also query hexflo_memory_search('briefing:') and include matching events in the per-project response under an 'events' array. Filter by 'since' param if provided. Mark events as 'seen' after retrieval if the client passes seen=true.
tasks.name: Update briefing endpoint to query briefing events from HexFlo memory

phases.description: When a regression is attributable to an agent action, trust for that scope drops one level automatically.
phases.name: Trust Decay — auto-reduce trust on regressions

tasks.description: Add a regression_detector module in hex-nexus/src/orchestration/. When a phase gate fails (test command returns non-zero), run git log --since=1h --format='%H %an' to find recent commits. For each commit, check if the author matches an agent pattern (contains 'hex-coder', 'claude', or matches session agent names). If so, identify which files were changed via git diff --name-only <hash>^..<hash>, then map files to hex architecture scopes (domain/, ports/, adapters/primary/, adapters/secondary/, etc.). Return a RegressionReport { scope: String, agent_id: String, commit_hash: String, failing_test: String }.
tasks.name: Regression detector: correlate test failures with recent agent commits

tasks.description: Add decay_trust() function that takes a RegressionReport and: (1) reads current trust level for the scope from HexFlo memory, (2) drops it one level (silent→act, act→suggest, suggest→observe), (3) stores the updated trust with decay_reason and last_decayed_at, (4) logs a briefing event with severity 'decision' explaining what happened. Respect pinned=true — pinned scopes never auto-decay. Wire this into workplan_executor.rs after gate failures.
tasks.name: Trust decay reducer: drop trust one level on regression

tasks.description: Add TrustAction::History variant to hex-cli that shows the trust change log for a project. Query HexFlo memory for keys matching 'trust-history:{project}:*'. Each entry records: timestamp, scope, old_level, new_level, reason (human|decay|elevate). Store these entries whenever set_trust or decay_trust is called. Render as a chronological table with colored level indicators.
tasks.name: hex trust history command

phases.description: Manual preference management with observation hooks. hex taste list/set/forget/pin.
phases.name: Taste Graph v1 — developer preference learning

tasks.description: Add taste entries in HexFlo memory with key 'taste:{scope}:{category}:{name}'. Scope is 'universal', 'lang:{language}', or 'domain:{domain}'. Categories: naming, structure, testing, dependencies, style, architecture. Each entry has: name, value (the preference text), confidence (0.0-1.0), source (manual|observed), created_at, last_applied_at. Add REST endpoints: GET /api/taste?scope=X — list preferences. POST /api/taste — set a preference. DELETE /api/taste/{key} — forget. PATCH /api/taste/{key}/pin — pin preference. Create hex-nexus/src/routes/taste.rs and wire into mod.rs router.
tasks.name: Taste storage schema and REST endpoints

tasks.description: Add TasteAction enum to hex-cli with variants: List { scope: Option<String> }, Set { scope: String, category: String, name: String, value: String }, Forget { key: String }, Pin { key: String }. Wire as 'hex taste' subcommand. 'list' renders a grouped table by category with confidence scores. 'set' calls POST /api/taste. Scope defaults to 'universal' if not specified. Examples: hex taste set universal naming 'prefer snake_case for Rust functions', hex taste list --scope lang:rust.
tasks.name: hex taste CLI commands

tasks.description: Modify hex-nexus/src/orchestration/mod.rs build_role_preamble() to append relevant taste preferences to agent prompts. When spawning an agent, query GET /api/taste for universal + language-specific + domain-specific preferences. Format as a 'Developer Preferences' section appended to the system prompt. Only inject preferences with confidence >= 0.5. Cap at 10 preferences to avoid prompt bloat. Log which preferences were injected to briefing buffer.
tasks.name: Taste injection into agent prompts

tasks.description: Add MCP tools hex_taste_list (params: scope) and hex_taste_set (params: scope, category, name, value) to mcp.rs. Add hex_taste_list to READ_ONLY_TOOLS. Update all 3 mcp-tools.json files with tool definitions.
tasks.name: Wire MCP tools for taste commands
